# Installation Completion Handover Standards: Pre-Commissioning Acceptance Criteria and Punch List Management

## 适用受众
Site_Supervisor

## 写作角度说明
安装完成面交接标准是现场主管将安装工程移交给调试团队的关键节点。通过明确的交接验收标准和问题清单管理，确保安装工程在满足基本要求后才进入调试阶段，避免调试期间因安装遗留问题而返工。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Handing over installation scope before the punch list is formally closed — rather than establishing a "live punch list" protocol with joint sign-off — shifts installation defect resolution responsibility to the commissioning team.

## 参考素材
- Pre-handover inspection criteria: 100% of mechanical fixings complete and torqued → 100% of electrical terminations complete with test records → 100% of sealing work complete → site cleaned to construction-clean standard → as-built drawings submitted
- Punch list categories: critical (commissioning cannot start), major (affects performance), minor (cosmetic)
- Handover protocol: joint inspection by installation supervisor and commissioning engineer → agree on open items → assign owner and resolution date → commissioning engineer signs acceptance with open items → installation supervisor responsible for resolving critical items before pre-commissioning
- As-built documentation: architectural drawings marked up with actual installed positions, electrical single-line diagram with circuit numbers, equipment serial number register
- Time buffer: schedule minimum 5 working days between installation completion and commissioning start for punch list resolution

## 关键词
Handover Standards, Punch List, Pre-Commissioning, Acceptance Criteria, Installation Completion, Quality Handover
